version_history.description: Aorta Exam(Abdomen) Protocol and Measurement added

protocolOrderByModeId.description: Maps each mode ID to a list of protocol IDs that support that mode

orderByModeList.description: Maps each mode ID to the list of measurement IDs that are relevant (i.e., should be shown) in that mode

orderBy.description: Maps each measurement ID to its display ordering number inside the UI or report
